title: Lines Written On A Window.
content:
Ye men of wit and wealth, why all this sneering
        'Gainst poor Excisemen? give the cause a hearing;
        What are you, landlords' rent-rolls? teasing ledgers:
        What premiers, what? even monarchs' mighty gaugers:
        Nay, what are priests, those seeming godly wise men?
        What are they, pray, but spiritual Excisemen?
meaning:
"Lines Written On A Window." is a quintessential example of Robert Burns's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
